OTP read base address, byte count, and XOR mode

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x14
Size:
0x4
Source:
otpc_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:25] - - - -
[24] rd_4bitxor1bit_en rw 0x0 enable 4-bit→1-bit XOR error correction on read
[23:16] rd_length rw 0x0 number of bytes to read (max 128)
[15:0] rd_base_addr rw 0x0 OTP byte address of first byte to read
